content:
Hello! It's great to meet you. How can I help you today?

If you have a specific workflow or problem you're looking to solve, you've come to the right place. We specialize in architecting AI solutions tailored to your business needs. 

You can simply type your problem below, and our agent will scope out a solution for you in just about 8 seconds—no signup required! Once we have that initial scope, we can connect you with a human to help you build it.

Is there anything specific you'd like to explore, or would you like to get started with a discovery call?

Hello! It's great to meet you. How can I help you today?

At Alian AI, we specialize in architecting AI solutions to solve your business problems—taking you from "we have a problem" all the way to a live production solution.

Whether you are looking for AI agents that don't sleep, such as lead-qualification or support agents, or you need RAG-powered chatbots and custom LLM apps, we are here to help.

If you have a specific workflow in mind, you can describe it on our site, and our AI will scope out a solution for you in about 8 seconds. From there, you can chat with one of our humans to get it built! 

Is there anything specific you'd like to know more about?

Hello! I'd be happy to help you with that.

MBIT stands for the **Madhuben & Bhanubhai Patel Institute of Technology**. 

Please let me know if you have any other questions about the institute—I'm here to help!
